text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Feng shui...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: It's the study of how the environment affects your relationship with fortune, for good or ill, backed up by solid evidence. And just so we're clear, it's not anything occult.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's a legitimate science based on evidence
accumulated over the past 3,000 years.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
By using feng shui to perceive the fortunes of the
surrounding environment and absorb qi energy...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Anyone can easily find happiness. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Amazing, right?! So, what do you say to taking
your first foray into the world of feng shui with
me? C'mon, say yes! Please?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It'll really take your race and test results to the
next level! There's no doubt in my mind! ♪

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Hmm... That would be pretty sweet if it was legit.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
But praying at a shrine's probably enough to do
the job, right? See you later, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hold on. This is totally different from relying
on divine intervention!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Geez... I keep trying, but no one gets it. All I want
to do is help everyone find their happiness.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Well, no point in standing around and moping! It looks like there's only one thing to do! Yep, there's only one thing I can do. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Don't you think now's just about the
perfect time?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I've found a partner in you, I've completed my
basic training, and on my way to class this
morning...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
When I was running up the hill from west to east,
the morning sun looked even brighter than usual.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: According to landform feng shui—which involves making decisions based on your surroundings—that's a clear sign that I ought to move forward!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, how about we try it? Y'know, the Twinkle
Series! Now's the time for us to put ourselves out
there into the world! ☆
choice_data_list: So you're all ready to go?
So you're all ready to go?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Of course! From the day we met... Since you and I
made our commitment...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I've been making preparations! Getting ready for
this exact moment. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the hopes of showing everyone the power of
feng shui and sharing its blessings far and wide,
Copano Rickey sets her sights on the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It may seem a little shady at first glance, but as
her trainer, I know it's real.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, over there! In that corner! A lot of trainers
are gathering in one spot. But why?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, it's not safe for them to run like this! You
have to stop the race from happening!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey sensed the danger through feng
shui. And her concerns were proven exactly right.
On top of that...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(I can see it... I can feel it... The flow of qi! The
earth's voice is telling me what's happening on
the track!)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(The final straight! The landform and the compass
are all in order. Luck is on my side. From here
on...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The fastest wins! Now to direct all the effort I've
put in to the lucky direction! YAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through the power of feng shui, she predicted
what was going to happen during the race, and
ran incredibly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Copano Rickey's feng shui is the real deal. And...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I want to win! I want to do great in the Twinkle
Series and make people believe in the power of
feng shui...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And I want to make everyone happy. ☆ Just like
how feng shui made me happy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I run into a problem or when my life
takes a new direction, it gives me just enough
courage to face things head-on. Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's what feng shui's about! ☆ Anyone can be
happy if they just know how to seize their chance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey's motivation for running is simple.
She wants to spread the wisdom of feng shui
through her races and make everyone happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's more than enough reason to support her.
She's a runner I want to help get up to the top, no
matter what.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
How about it, Trainer? Are you going to give me
the go-ahead?
choice_data_list:
Of course! Let's do our very best, starting from
today!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yayyy! Then from here on out, I'll work hard to
change people's perceptions of feng shui. Little
by little, step by step.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run in real races and show them just
how amazing the power of feng shui can be. ☆

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Rickey. I heard that you've decided to make
your debut?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
If the rumors are true, then congratulations.
There's something I want to talk to you about
first, though...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Are you going to specialize in dirt races? I
remember hearing you were better suited to dirt
than turf.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oohoo, things are sure to get lively if Rickey joins
us.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, Tarumae! Acute!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep, you betcha. I'm going to go all out on the
dirt. ☆ At first, anyway. I mean...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Dirt's the best for feng shui! ♪ All that sand
scattering about gives shape to both the state of
the environment and everyone's ambitions.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Oop... Feng shui... There you go again with all
that pie-in-the-sky talk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Hokko Tarumae. She's in the year above
Copano Rickey and races to promote her
hometown of Tomakomai, where she's a local
idol.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, but I'd say it's nice that she's got a hobby
she's so passionate about. Don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And this is Wonder Acute. She's a real dirt track
veteran and tends to speak in a grandmotherly
fashion.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I'm all about you giving it your absolute best. I
just don't want you getting caught up in
superstitions...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: And I'm just hoping we can all have a nice, friendly race together.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
You're just like a granddaughter to me, Rickey.
That's why I'm going to give you plenty of
encouraging little pats on the head.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, c'mon, you two. I'm serious about putting my
best foot forward in every race, you know.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But I guess you might not believe in the power of
feng shui until you actually see it in action.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. She might not be able to convince
them with words alone. In that case...
choice_data_list:
We'll show them what feng shui can do in a
race, Rickey!

We'll show them what feng shui can do in a
race, Rickey!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Just like you believe in me, Trainer, I'm sure
that someday everyone else will too!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's do this! I'm going to spread the
teachings of feng shui by running, and make
everyone happy for sure!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Super happy!
